entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum americanum (L.) Leeke, the crop studied for rust resistance

entities.name: PUCCINIA PENNISETI
entities.description: The fungal pathogen causing pearl millet rust

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to resist infection by Puccinia penniseti

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain or forage produced by the crop

entities.name: CROSSING
entities.description: The breeding technique used to study the inheritance of rust resistance

entities.name: CHAD
entities.description: The country of origin for the germplasm accession #2696-1-4

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the rust pressure evaluations were conducted

entities.name: RUST PRESSURE
entities.description: The severity of the rust pathogen's presence during evaluation

entities.name: RPP1
entities.description: The single dominant gene that confers rust resistance

entities.name: RPP1 RECESSIVE
entities.description: The recessive allele that confers susceptibility to rust

entities.name: MALE STERILE LINES
entities.description: Specific breeding lines used as parents in the crosses

entities.name: MENDELIAN RATIO
entities.description: The 3:1 and 1:1 ratios used to determine the inheritance pattern of the resistance gene
